name: plugin-self-improvement
description: Continuous self-improvement for the Claude Code plugin collection (matt-dotfiles). Turns 'aha' moments into durable, tracked work: the capture-plugin-insight skill triggers on a realization, epiphany, or contradiction about a plugin/skill/command/agent and the /improve-plugin command captures it explicitly. Both file a bead labeled `plugin-improvement` under a long-lived self-improvement epic bead (discovered by the `plugin-self-improvement` label), so insights aren't lost in the moment they occur. A thin SessionStart hook reminds the model the capability exists. The portable, beads-backed counterpart of the ADS plugin-self-improvement plugin in the matt-plugins marketplace.
